## Problem

What workflow is hard or impossible today?

## Proposed behavior

What would you like `amux` to do?

## Alternatives considered

Are there workarounds or different designs worth noting?

## Additional context

Include examples if useful. Please use placeholder thread IDs and paths when sharing configs.
